name: Bounty Pie
recipeIngredient: Envelope Onion-Mushroom Soup mix OR Beefy mushroom-OR Beefy Onion Soup Mix
1/4 tsp Dried thyme or basil, crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine soup mix, ground beef, bread crumbs, sour cream, egg, and thyme in a large bowl.
2. Sprinkle flour into a 9-inch pie pan.
3. Press the ground beef mixture onto the bottom and up the sides of the pan, shaping the edge 3/4 inch above the pan and forming a center well.
4. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 40 minutes; drain.
5. Layer 3/4 cup of cheese, vegetables, and remaining 3/4 cup cheese on the meat mixture.
6. Bake for an additional 10 minutes or until cheese is melted.
